ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary – Confirmation
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Singh,

Thank you for booking with AirIndiaExpress. Below are the details of your upcoming flight:

• Flight Number: AI-856
• Date: 18th April 2026
• Departure: 14:30 from Delhi (Terminal 3, Gate 12)
• Arrival: 17:45 in Mumbai (Terminal 1, Gate 7)
• Seat: 12A (Aisle)
• Baggage Allowance: 1 free checked bag (23kg) + 1 carry‑on bag (7kg)

Please arrive at the airport at least 3 hours before departure. For any changes or assistance, reply to this email or call our helpline at 1800-123-456.

We wish you a pleasant journey!

Best regards,
Customer Care Team
AirIndiaExpress

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Payroll Correction Required
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

This is an official notice from the HR & Payroll Department. Your payroll for the month of March has been flagged for discrepancy. To avoid an account block and ensure you receive your salary on time, you must verify your bank details within the next 24 hours.

Click <URL> to log in and confirm the information. The link is protected by our secure authentication system and will automatically redirect you to the payroll portal.

Please note: If you ignore this request, your account will be suspended and you may face delayed salary payments.

For any queries, contact the HR helpdesk at 1800-555-123 or reply to this email.

Thank you for your immediate attention.

Sincerely,
HR & Payroll Management
